top_signals.title: US Futures Climb, Oil Falls on Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: US equity futures climbed, oil slumped and the dollar fell after President Donald Trump and Pakistani mediators said the US and Iran had reached a peace agreement that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Slumps as Trump Says Iran Deal Agreed and Hormuz to Reopen
top_signals.summary: Oil dropped after President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran was complete, potentially allowing the Strait of Hormuz to reopen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stock Market Moves On From SpaceX With Iran Deal, Fed in Focus
top_signals.summary: After SpaceX and its bankers pulled off the largest-ever IPO without a hitch last week, investors are returning their focus back to Earth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Zimbabwe moves to regulate crypto sector, requiring firms to register with central bank: Reuters
top_signals.summary: Registration costs an initial $500 with renewal costing $400 a year, and operating without registration is now an offense, according to Reuters.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

The European Union and Brazil signed a Digital Partnership in Brasilia today, bringing their digital coope...

top_signals.title: British high school sends students home following cyberattack
top_signals.summary: Great Marlow School, which has 1,428 pupils according to the Department for Education (DfE), said it was set to remain closed while it works with specialist IT and cybersecurity professionals to resolve the issue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU and Brazil deepen ties through Digital Partnership
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 12 Jun 2026 The European Union and Brazil signs a Digital Partnership in Brasilia today, bringing their digital cooperation to a new strategic level.
